Becoming an IT specialist in a nutshell:

... or what to do to be like Mark Zuckerberg

Are you tired of your job? Do you think that you have a potential to do something more impactful? This is a perfect place for you to start! The path to a better future seems to be dark and treacherous but in reality, all you need to do is follow the next few steps:

  • Wake up and do not !@#$ around
  • Stay positive, COVID negative
  • Have a friend who will tell you about the Green Fox Academy
    1. Before applying, think about aliens a bit
    2. Apply Online
    3. Play two games
    4. Hope for the best
  • Listen what the mentor's have to say and profit
